bucket.description: Specifies the name of the S3 bucket to configure; must be unique across all AWS accounts and regions.

eventbridge.description: Enables or disables EventBridge notifications for the S3 bucket; defaults to false if not specified.

lambda_function.description: Defines a list of Lambda function configurations for S3 bucket events, including event types, optional filters (prefix/suffix), and the function's ARN.
lambda_function.type: list(object({events: list(string),filter_prefix: optional(string),filter_suffix: optional(string),id: optional(string),lambda_function_arn: optional(string)}))

queue.description: Defines a list of SQS queue configurations for S3 bucket events, specifying event types, optional filters (prefix/suffix), and the queue's ARN.
queue.type: list(object({events: list(string),filter_prefix: optional(string),filter_suffix: optional(string),id: optional(string),queue_arn: string}))

topic.description: Defines a list of SNS topic configurations for S3 bucket events, specifying event types, optional filters (prefix/suffix), and the topic's ARN.
topic.type: list(object({events: list(string),filter_prefix: optional(string),filter_suffix: optional(string),id: optional(string),topic_arn: string}))
